info.title: FastAPI Httpbin
info.description:
HTTP Endpoints for easy testing of your app. Built with the FastAPI framework, this is heavily based on the original Httpbin website. About this project - Development Roadmap - Dead Simple QR Code Generator - Form for testing Password Managers like 1Password and BitWarden

GitHub repo

Run locally in Docker: docker run -p 80:80 dmuth1/fastapi-httpbin Main Site - Mirrors: Fly Railway Render

200.description: Return the user's IPv4 address, if present.

422.description: Returned if user came in over IPv6
